description.en: A slender, spotted African wildcat with the longest legs and largest ears relative to its body size.
description.zh: 一种身形修长、长满斑点的非洲野猫，拥有相对于体型最长的腿和最大的耳朵。

anatomy.en: The serval looks like a mini cheetah! It is a medium-sized cat with a beautiful golden coat covered in black spots. For its size, it has the longest legs and biggest ears of any cat in the world, making it look like a little supermodel.
anatomy.zh: 薮猫看起来就像迷你猎豹！它是一种中型猫科动物，披着带有黑斑的美丽金色外衣。就其体型而言，它是世界上所有猫科动物中腿最长、耳朵最大的，看起来像个小超模。

ecology_and_behavior.en: Those huge ears act like radar dishes, allowing the serval to hear mice moving under the ground. When it finds a mouse, it leaps high into the air and pounces down on it with both front paws. They are incredibly successful hunters!
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 那些巨大的耳朵就像雷达天线，让薮猫能听到老鼠在地下移动的声音。当发现老鼠时，它会高高跃向空中，然后用两只前爪猛扑下去。它们是极其成功的猎手！

habitat_and_distribution.en: Servals live in the tall grasslands and wetlands of sub-Saharan Africa. They love areas near water where tall reeds and grass help hide them while they hunt for frogs, birds, and rodents.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 薮猫生活在撒哈拉以南非洲的高草草原和湿地。它们喜欢靠近水的地方，那里高高的芦苇和草丛有助于它们在捕食青蛙、鸟类和啮齿动物时隐藏自己。
